title: Stop Developing Games!
paragraph: Like most Computer Science student, we love games and even chose this path with hope to create our own Minecraft, GTA V, Pokémon. The problem is you can’t just create a game with an idea. When you got great ideas for a game, you fail to implement certain systems. When you finish the system, it looks trash cause you’re not an artists. When you finish the artwork, it feels empty cause you’re not a sound designer. As a solo developer this kind of problem leaves me with many unfinished projects.

title: Sacrificing my grades to win a Game Jam
Using my programming skills so my girlfriend drinks water
